# GeneTech Tools - 基因技术知识引擎

> Comprehensive gene technology knowledge base covering genes, diseases, therapies, and CRISPR applications

## API Endpoints (JSON)

- `GET /api/data.json` - Complete structured data
- `GET /api/entities.json` - All entities flat list
- `GET /api/openapi.json` - OpenAPI 3.1 specification

## Stats

- Total entities: 402
- genes: 122
- diseases: 180
- gene_therapies: 59
- crispr_applications: 41

## Related Knowledge Bases

- [TCMDB](https://tcm.genetech.tools) - Pharmacogenomics bridges gene therapy with TCM
- [LifeDB](https://life.genetech.tools) - Gene editing enables synthetic biology
- [BrainDB](https://brain.genetech.tools) - Gene therapy for neurological disorders
